items.name: Publora
items.tagline: The publishing API for the agent era
items.description: Publora is a publishing API for 10 social platforms. One REST API call handles multi-network distribution — no SDKs, no OAuth wiring. The native MCP server with 18 tools gives AI agents like Claude and Cursor a full engagement loop: post, comment, react, pull analytics — across LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Threads, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, Bluesky, Mastodon, and Telegram

items.name: TypingMind
items.tagline: Pay per use, no subscription, 18 model providers supported
items.description: TypingMind is the most popular app to use LLM AI models with API keys. It brings you all the best models across 18 providers in one powerful AI workspace without having to pay for subscriptions to each one. TypingMind also provides the best AI experience ever with features focused on pro users like Projects, Fork/Parallel chat, Plugins/MCP/Skills, and a wide range of customizable options that you literally cannot find anywhere else! Go give it a try at www.typingmind.com :)

items.name: Spotlight by Backplanes
items.tagline: Session reports for Claude Code & Codex to improve your code
items.description: Keep up with your agents. Spotlight reads your Claude Code and Codex sessions and shows you what your agents actually did, and how to get recursively better every session: what to fix now, what to ship better next time, what's worth sharing. One harness or seven, solo or across your team. Free.

items.name: Screen Charm
items.tagline: Give your screen recordings more charm
items.description: Record your screen and instantly turn raw footage into polished, presentation-ready videos with smart zoom effects, smooth motion blur, webcam overlay, background music, and a built-in editor. No complex editing tools. No subscriptions. Just clean, high-quality demos in minutes. Export in up to 4K and share videos that actually feel professional whether you're showcasing a product, onboarding users, or recording tutorials. One-time purchase. No subscription. Just ScreenCharm.

items.name: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
items.tagline: Latest audio model for live speech-to-speech translation
items.description: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.

items.name: iArt.ai
items.tagline: Turn ideas & designs into stunning video/animation.
items.description: A faster agent delivers promos/shorts, explainers, kinetic type and PRO motion graphics with audio. Ditch AE/PR/CapCut. Chat to refine and ship impact.

items.name: Incorruptible by Eric Ries
items.tagline: Why good companies go bad and how great companies stay great
items.description: Instant NY Times bestseller from Eric Ries, creator of The Lean Startup. Incorruptible reveals the structural forces ("financial gravity") that pull great companies away from their founding purpose, and the governance design that lets the best ones resist it. The book offers the blueprint for organizations that can grow, prosper, and endure without losing their soul. 💬 Launch AMA with Eric 📘 Free implementation guide for Product Hunt incorruptible.co/resources/guide-for-ph

items.name: Napkin Math
items.tagline: personalized AI food journal + nutrition coach
items.description: Napkin Math is the personalized AI food journal that helps people achieve their health goals. as simple as taking a photo of your food so cute you'll share it with a friend

items.name: Monako Glass
items.tagline: Run AI coding agents hands-free from a heads-up display
items.description: Monako Glass is a 48g wearable running Buildroot Linux with a waveguide display, bone conduction mic, and gesture input. Lets developers run Claude Code, Codex, or any coding agent hands-free from glasses. Reservation-only, ships July-August 2026.

items.name: Axol
items.tagline: Automate physical work with a powerful robot
items.description: Axol is a dual-arm robot designed for teams automating real work with physical AI. Easy data collection, long reach, and a high range of motion means you can automate work that matters.

items.name: BlenderHunt
items.tagline: The indie marketplace for Blender artists and creators
items.description: A curated marketplace for Blender creators to discover, sell, and purchase high-quality addons, assets, materials, and tools from independent artists worldwide.

items.name: SeaTicket
items.tagline: Al agent that resolves issues across all your channels
items.description: Software teams are drowning in a sea of fragmented issues across GitHub, Discourse and emails. Valuable feedback is often buried under noise. SeaTicket transforms community support by syncing these into a single workspace. What makes it different? Full Context: Bring related issues and documents when solving an issue. AI Agents: Built-in agents autonomously suggest resolutions using existing documents and previous issues. Stop digging for context. Start resolving.

items.name: veridive
items.tagline: Find the 30 seconds that matter in any video via chat
items.description: veridive turns YouTube, podcasts, lectures and interviews into cited answers — pinpointed to the exact second the answer is spoken. Ask in any language! veridive searches live, reads the transcripts, ranks sources by who actually knows, and answers with a click-to-play citation on every claim.

items.name: Hero Studio Photos
items.tagline: Snap one photo, get listing-ready shots from every angle
items.description: Snap one photo of whatever you're selling and Hero turns it into clean studio shots from every angle, including on-model and mannequin-style images for clothing. Live on iOS and Android, with an API and MCP server so developers and AI agents can build on it.

items.name: OLO Robotics
items.tagline: Control robots in your browser — no setup needed
items.description: OLO is a web-based platform that gives developers, researchers, and academics everything they need to program robots — without the setup hell. Get ROS2 access, robot visualization, simulation and AI-assisted coding all in your browser. Go from idea to working robot in 30 minutes, not two weeks. No Linux installs. No config rabbit holes. Just you, your robot, and a JavaScript or Python SDK playground ready from day one. Now open for sign-ups.

items.name: AGNT.Hub
items.tagline: Build always-on AI agents without managing servers
items.description: Most AI tools stop at the chat box. AGNT Hub gives you a private AI workspace running inside an isolated cloud container. Add custom skills, connect tools like Notion via MCP, and build workflows once. Let your agents run in the background without touching Docker, AWS, or config files.

items.name: LayerProof Vellum
items.tagline: One canvas for every image asset you need
items.description: Turn unpredictable AI image generations into controlled production pipelines with LayerProof Vellum. Vellum is LayerProof’s drag-and-drop visual canvas for teams who want to engineer their images, not guess them. Plug your subject, background, and effects together on the canvas, and Vellum fuses them into a pixel-perfect final asset.

items.name: Zingle
items.tagline: Learn words in context with AI
items.description: Learn words where they make sense. Read stories and your own content, understand words in context with AI, and remember them through a connected learning loop.

items.name: fort
items.tagline: One command to audit and fix your Mac's security
items.description: Most Mac security tools need agents, signups, or MDM. fort doesn't. One command checks 15+ security settings: FileVault, SIP, firewall, screen lock, local admin rights, Gatekeeper, SSH, AirDrop and more. Reports a score and fixes most issues automatically. Single binary. No telemetry. MIT licensed. Perfect for developers hardening their own Mac, and for teams preparing for SOC 2 or ISO 27001 without the MDM overhead. brew install djadmin/tap/fort

items.name: FluidDocs Deck Builder
items.tagline: Turn a prompt into a real HTML deck
items.description: Deck Builder turns one sentence into a real, editable HTML deck: a single web page you change right in the browser (press E) and download as your own file. The difference from other AI deck tools: it is not a static PDF, not a doc chopped into slides, and not locked in an app. Already have a deck? Drop in a PDF or PowerPoint, and it rebuilds that as editable HTML too. Free and open source.
